skills.description: Build comprehensive attack trees to visualize threat paths. Use when mapping attack scenarios, identifying defense gaps, or communicating security risks to stakeholders.
trigger_conditions: Planning defensive investments or test scopes
anti_triggers: You lack authorization or a defined scope to model the system
The task is a general risk review without attack-path modeling
The request is unrelated to security assessment or design

skills.description: Enables ultra-granular, line-by-line code analysis to build deep architectural context before vulnerability or bug finding.
trigger_conditions: Deep comprehension is needed before bug or vulnerability discovery
Bottom-up understanding instead of high-level guessing is required

skills.description: This skill ensures all code follows security best practices and identifies potential vulnerabilities.
trigger_conditions: Handling user input or file uploads
anti_triggers: Working with public data without security measures

skills.description: Master major dependency version upgrades, compatibility analysis, staged upgrade strategies, and comprehensive testing approaches.
anti_triggers: The task is unrelated to dependency upgrade
You need a different domain or tool outside this scope

skills.description: Security-focused code review for PRs, commits, and diffs.

Identify and exploit file path traversal vulnerabilities by understanding traversal principles, identifying vulnerable parameters, testing basic and advanced techniques, bypassing filters, targeting specific files, automating with tools like Burp Suite, ffuf, and wfuzz, and implementing secure coding practices to prevent such vulnerabilities.
trigger_conditions: When testing web applications for potential file path traversal vulnerabilities
During security assessments or penetration tests to identify and exploit sensitive data exposure
anti_triggers: When dealing with user input that does not involve file paths
In scenarios where the application is designed to prevent directory traversal attacks

skills.description: Find bugs, security vulnerabilities, and code quality issues in local branch changes.
trigger_conditions: audit code on the current branch
anti_triggers: when the task is unrelated to code review

skills.description: Audit and fix HTML metadata including page titles, meta descriptions, canonical URLs, Open Graph tags, Twitter cards, favicons, JSON-LD structured data, and robots directives. Use when adding or reviewing SEO and social metadata.
trigger_conditions: implementing Open Graph or Twitter card metadata
anti_triggers: migrating frameworks or SEO libraries unless requested

skills.description: Find exploitable vulnerabilities in GitHub Actions workflows, ensuring each finding includes a concrete exploitation scenario.
anti_triggers: expression injection in push-only workflows on protected branches

skills.description: Execute systematic privilege escalation assessments on Linux systems to identify and exploit misconfigurations, vulnerable services, and security weaknesses that allow elevation from low-privilege user access to root-level control.
trigger_conditions: Low-privilege shell access to target Linux system
Network access for reverse shell connections (if needed)
anti_triggers: Systems with advanced security measures like SELinux or AppArmor
dependencies: Basic understanding of Linux utilities and scripting
Knowledge of kernel versions and associated vulnerabilities

skills.description: Provide comprehensive techniques for escalating privileges from a low-privileged user to root/administrator access on compromised Linux and Windows systems. Essential for penetration testing post-exploitation phase and red team operations.
trigger_conditions: low-privilege shell access on target system
anti_triggers: leaving persistence mechanisms without client approval

skills.description: Provide systematic methodologies for discovering and exploiting privilege escalation vulnerabilities on Windows systems during penetration testing engagements.
trigger_conditions: Initial Access as standard user on a Windows system
Need to escalate privileges from standard user to Administrator or SYSTEM
